---
title: "Publications"
description-meta: "Information, pdfs, and social metrics of papers"
#page-layout: full
#back-to-top-navigation: true
title-block-banner: false
css: custom.css
bibliography: publications.bib
csl: aps-chronological.csl
nocite: '@*'
---

```{python}
#| eval: true
#| echo: false

import subprocess

# automatic update of my publications list
some_cmd_result = subprocess.run('curl "https://inspirehep.net/api/literature?q=authors.recid:1755571&format=bibtex&size=1000" > publications.bib', shell=True, capture_output=True)

```


# My profile on research databases

- [Inspire HEP {{< ai inspire >}}](https://inspirehep.net/authors/1755571) 
- [Orcid {{< ai orcid >}}](https://orcid.org/0000-0002-6509-447X)
- [Web Of Science {{< ai clarivate >}}](https://www.webofscience.com/wos/author/record/PFK-1395-2025)
- [Google Scholar {{< ai google-scholar >}}](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=B95wK7wAAAAJ&hl=it)

:::{.callout-note collapse="true" title="Peer reviewer activity -- `click to expand`"}

- [Physics Review D](https://journals.aps.org/prd/): one paper in 2023 and one in 2024 [^1].

[^1]: As usual in [peer review](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Peer_review), in order to maintain anonymity I am not disclosing which papers I have reviewed. 

:::


# List of publications
